name: build_from_figma
prompt: Use $figma-ios-build-review to implement this Figma frame as a UIKit screen. Figma: https://www.figma.com/design/FILE_KEY/App?node-id=12-34. Target: SettingsViewController populated state. Use the existing SnapKit patterns and make it reachable through the existing harness route.

name: review_existing_ui
prompt: Use $figma-ios-build-review to compare the existing ProfileHeaderView against this Figma node and polish spacing, typography, and icon assets. Navigation is covered by .harness/flows/profile.yaml.

name: static_review_blocked
prompt: Use $figma-ios-build-review to review this UIKit code snippet against a screenshot. I do not have a runnable app target in this repo.
must_include: no claim of complete live review
